🟣 Regen Foundation

Support Provider
🌐 Visit website

Regen Foundation is a nonprofit organization that supports the governance, equity, and cultural integrity of regenerative finance and ecological stewardship networks. It facilitates participatory research, funding, and capacity-building for bioregional groups, while stewarding commons-based structures that bridge blockchain innovation with community-led environmental restoration.

Activities

🔸

Biocultural Jaguar Credits Program
